name: Clip Stage
explanation: A clean, transparent soft-clip saturator and drive stage — built for warmth, glue and gentle level control rather than grind. A makeup-compensated Drive feeds a selectable transfer curve: DIODE gives a symmetric soft knee with odd harmonics, while TUBE adds a small bias for asymmetric, even-harmonic warmth (an internal DC blocker removes the resulting offset). A subtle Tone tilt opens or darkens the top, an output Trim sets level, and a parallel Mix blends the saturated signal back against the dry. Controls: Drive, Curve (diode/tube), Tone, Trim and Mix.
